# Netflix’s Paternity Test & Sotheby’s $200M Bonanza

 =UTF-8qnza=_Wed,_20_Nov_2024_20-06-33_+0000_1934b2f234bbb43d.html

Elon’s New Orbit, Linda’s EdSec Smackdown, WBD’s ESPN Equation
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.) | | |  | | --- | | **Elon’s New Orbit, Linda’s EdSec Smackdown, WBD’s ESPN Equation** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon medley of Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Eriq Gardner** chronicles yet *another* Netflix First Amendment drama, this time surrounding the streamer’s hair-raising ’22 documentary *Our Father* , about an Indiana fertility specialist who secretly fathered at least 94 children without his patients’ knowledge. The lawsuit, now headed to a jury trial, raises the provocative question: Did the children have a constitutional right to remain anonymous?     Plus, below the fold: **Marion Maneker** assesses the $200 million-plus **Sydell Miller** auction at Sotheby’s. **John Heilemann** wrangles a pair of rising Democratic congressmen for their candid postmortems. **Tara Palmeri** gets the skinny on **Linda McMahon** ’s place in **Trump** ’s cabinet. On *Impolitic* , John and *The Atlantic* ’s **Tom Nichols** consider how **Putin** and **Xi** are preparing for Trump’s boomerang to the Oval. On *The Varsity* , **John Ourand** connects with Axios’s **Sara Fischer** to discuss Netflix’s live sports quandary, WBD’s NBA détente, and much more. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Peter Hamby** sits down with **Bill Cohan** to evaluate **Elon** ’s political clout in Mar-a-Lago. | |  | | [Netflix’s Paternity Test](https://email.puck.) | | ERIQ GARDNER | | Here’s an unscripted plot twist: Netflix has become a villain in its own documentary film, about a fertility specialist who secretly inseminated his patients, after disclosing the names of the doctor’s children without their consent. A lawsuit, now headed to a jury trial, raises the provocative question: Did they have a constitutional right to remain private? | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM OUR SPONSOR** | |  | | "Crackles with wit and creative energy" — ROGEREBERT.COM     "Donald Glover and Maya Erskine are divine" — THEWRAP     Meet the Smiths: two lonely strangers, John and Jane, who have given up their lives and identities to be thrown together as partners – both in espionage and in marriage. Starring Donald Glover and Maya Erskine.     The Emmy ® -winning series *Mr. & Mrs. Smith* is awards eligible and available for guild members at  [ConsiderAmazon.com](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Miller’s Crossing](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvZmFsbC1hcnQtYXVjdGlvbnMtdGhlLWJvZmZvLW1pbGxlci1zYWxlLWFuZC1waWNhc3Nvcy1zbHVtcC8_) | | MARION MANEKER | | News and notes from the November sales romp: Buyers have cash and determination, but are still picky; Picasso had a rough night; and Matisse was mixed. But Kandinsky cleared $21 million and an unsigned Monet waterlilies sold for $65.5 million. (And yes, those Les Lalannes tables everyone is going wild for did just fine.) | |  | | [Party Animals](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcmVwcy1zZXRoLW1vdWx0b24tYW5kLXJpY2hpZS10b3JyZXMtb24tZml4aW5nLXdoYXRzLWJyb2tlbi8_) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | Two up-and-coming Democratic congressmen—Seth Moulton and Ritchie Torres—candidly assess the great political realignment of ’24, offering some well-deserved scorn, and some timely constructive solutions, for their flailing party. | |  | | [The Miseducation of Linda McMahon](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Trump transition co-chair Linda McMahon will likely become Secretary of Education—a role that would put her in charge of leading a department that Republicans intend to dismantle. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Tom Nichols: Incendiary Nominations, Global Conflagrations & Presidential Pyromania](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | John is joined by Tom Nichols, professor emeritus of national-security affairs at the U.S. Naval War College, to discuss Donald Trump’s foreign policy appointments and the challenges he will face upon his return to the Oval Office. Nichols offers a tour d’horizon of global hotspots that will test Trump’s mettle immediately, and his assessment of how America’s foreign adversaries view his return to power. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Netflix’s Fight Night & Zaz NBA Play](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN OURAND | | John is joined by Axios media star Sara Fischer for a look behind the headlines captivating the sports world: the glitch-ridden Tyson-Paul bout, TNT’s partnership with ESPN, WBD’s settlement with the NBA, how Trump 2.0 will impact local sports, and much more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Musk-Trump Market Singularity](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL3RoZS1tdXNrLXRydW1wLW1hcmtldC1zaW5ndWxhcml0eS8_) | | PETER HAMBY & WILLIAM D. COHAN | | Bill Cohan joins Peter to put a number on Elon Musk’s growing political clout in Trump’s social orbit—raising the intriguing possibility that Musk’s indebted X, and Trump’s overvalued meme-stock DJT, could merge. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUU3kzZHFhdnJiTDNGazJKd09VRT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
